title: Puerto Banus Dolphin Watching Romantic Boat Hire Guide 2026
html:
For a romantic dolphin-watching excursion from Puerto Banus, couples typically pay from 250 OMR for a half-day private charter aboard a well-equipped motor yacht. Depart from the La Bajadilla marina or the main port, and let BoatHire24 connect you with trusted skippers ready to navigate the Mediterranean waters off Marbella.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

Puerto Banus itself is the primary departure hub, with its main marina offering direct access to the Mediterranean. The nearby La Bajadilla port in Marbella gives an alternative quieter start. For a more secluded launch, consider the small boat launch at Cabopino beach or the marina in Estepona, 12 nautical miles west. Once at sea, head towards the waters off Gibraltar or the Bay of Marbella where common dolphins often surface.

Which boat to rent

  1. Azimut 50, best for an intimate couple's dolphin tour; sleeps up to 4; from 300 OMR half-day.
  2. Fairline Squadron 58, ideal for small groups wanting speed and comfort; accommodates 6; from 350 OMR half-day.
  3. Lagoon 42 catamaran, perfect for extra stability and space while whale watching; carries 8; from 400 OMR half-day.
  4. Maiora 26m superyacht, for a premium romantic sunset dolphin cruise; hosts up to 10; from 600 OMR half-day. Check the Maiora 26m listing on BoatHire24 for full details and availability.

How much does it cost to rent a boat for dolphin watching in Puerto Banus?

Half-day private boat rentals for two people typically run between 250 and 500 OMR, depending on the vessel and season. Shared dolphin-watching tours start from 40 OMR per person. Crewed luxury yachts with a skipper and host can exceed 700 OMR for a full day.

  • Shared group tour: from 40 OMR per person (3 hours)
  • Small motorboat (half-day, self-drive): from 250 OMR
  • Catamaran (full-day, skipper included): from 450 OMR
  • Crewed motor yacht (full-day, inclusive): from 600 OMR

To compare verified options and secure the best price, explore boat rental Puerto Banus listings directly.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Puerto Banus?

For self-drive boats under 15 metres, a valid ICC or national equivalent is usually required; for crewed charters, no licence is needed. The exact requirements vary by vessel and operator, so always confirm with the provider before booking. In summer, from June to September, the sea is calm and the Levante wind is rare, making it the prime dolphin-watching season. Many skippers recommend an early morning departure for the best sightings before the afternoon breeze picks up.

Local tip: anchor off the Cabo Pino sand bar for a secluded swim stop where dolphins sometimes play near the shallows.

At a glance

  • Price range: 250, 700 OMR half-day
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: 3, 8 hours
  • Capacity: 2, 10 guests
  • Currency: OMR (Omani Rial)
  • Typical sightings: common and bottlenose dolphins, occasionally fin whales

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

Is it possible to rent a boat without a skipper in Puerto Banus?

Yes, you can hire a bareboat if you hold the appropriate licence, but most romantic charters include a skipper for a stress-free experience.

What is the best time of day for dolphin watching in Puerto Banus?

Morning trips between 9 am and 12 pm offer calm seas and higher dolphin activity, while sunset cruises provide a romantic backdrop.

Can I bring my own food and drink on a chartered boat in Puerto Banus?

Most charter parties are allowed to bring their own refreshments, though some skippers provide catering as an optional extra.

Are dolphins guaranteed on a dolphin-watching charter from Puerto Banus?

While no operator can guarantee sightings, the waters off the Costa del Sol have resident pods, and skippers know the best hunting grounds.

Ready to create unforgettable memories on the Mediterranean? Book a dolphin-watching romantic boat charter through BoatHire24 and enjoy a seamless experience. Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
